subcodes.first_line: O thou distinguished scion of the household of Samandar! From the earliest days of God's Cause, they rendered outstanding services, like unto a blazing fire [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب امین خاندان حضرت سمندر نار موقده از بدایت امرالله خدمات فائقه نمودند
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
